cards.back: A square matrix where entry (i,j) represents whether there is an edge between vertex i and vertex j
A matrix that represents the incidence relation between vertices and edges of a graph, with rows for vertices and columns for edges
A matrix representation of a graph where row i represents vertex i and column j indicates if there is an edge from i to j
A matrix representation of a graph where row i represents vertex i and column j indicates if there is a path from i to j

cards.front: What is represented by a Circuit Matrix?
cards.back: A Circuit Matrix represents a graph as a set of edges, not the vertices themselves
